title: Inventory Close With Mouse Fix
description: Partial fix for MC-577. Inventories can be closed with the bound mouse button
body:
# Inventory Close With Mouse Fix

Partial fix for [MC-577](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-577). Inventories can be closed with the bound mouse button.  

Probably will work on any version starting from 1.21.9.
